hero.subtitle: Reveal your essence with image consulting that brings together elegance, authenticity, and confidence.

about.title: About Aline Loof
about.text: I am an image consultant specializing in working with discerning clients who wish to align their appearance, personality, and purpose. Through my exclusive method, I analyze colorimetry, style, makeup, and accessories to craft an authentic and impactful visual identity.

services_preview.title: What I can do for you
services_preview.subtitle: Services designed to elevate your presence in every detail.

items.title: Closet Cleanse
items.desc: Organize and curate the pieces that truly enhance your image.

items.title: Color Palette
items.desc: Discover the colors that harmonize with your natural colorimetry.

items.title: Color Day Session
items.desc: A practical and transformative immersion into your personal palette.

items.title: Event Styling
items.desc: Personalized styling for special moments that call for sophistication.

categories.title: Style Categories
categories.subtitle: Each person has a unique visual language. Discover yours.
categories.intro: Style categories are archetypes that represent the visual and behavioral essence of each person. Identifying your category is the first step to building an authentic and powerful image.

items.name: Classic
items.desc: Timeless, elegant, and refined. The classic style favors quality pieces, well-defined cuts, and a sophisticated neutral palette. Ideal for those who value tradition and understated authority.

items.name: Romantic
items.desc: Delicate, feminine, and poetic. Pastel tones, flowing fabrics, floral details, and soft silhouettes compose this universe of sensitivity and charm.

items.name: Natural
items.desc: Comfortable, authentic, and uncomplicated. The natural style values organic fabrics, earthy tones, and an effortless approach — genuine presence without apparent effort.

items.name: Dramatic
items.desc: Impactful, bold, and memorable. Strong lines, striking contrasts, and a presence that commands any environment. For those who are not afraid to be seen.

items.name: Creative
items.desc: Original, expressive, and unexpected. The creative style mixes references, textures, and colors in surprising ways, transforming clothing into art.

items.name: Sporty
items.desc: Dynamic, functional, and modern. Practicality meets style in versatile pieces that move effortlessly between casual and elegant.

categories.cta: Discover your category with a consultation

accessories.title: Accessories
accessories.subtitle: The details that complete and elevate every composition.
accessories.intro: Accessories are not extras — they are the signature of your image. Knowing how to choose and combine bags, shoes, jewelry, scarves, and other adornments can completely transform a look.

sections.title: Jewelry & Fashion Jewelry
sections.desc: From metal choice to piece volume, every jewel speaks about who you are. Learn to select the right pieces for each occasion and your lifestyle.

sections.title: Bags
sections.desc: The bag is one of the most strategic accessories in your wardrobe. Proportion, material, and function — every choice counts.

sections.title: Footwear
sections.desc: The right shoe can elongate the silhouette, convey authority, or communicate lightness. Understand how footwear impacts your visual language.

sections.title: Scarves & Wraps
sections.desc: Versatile and elegant, scarves are key pieces for those who want to vary their look intelligently. Discover ways to wear them and the ideal fabrics for each style.

cema.title: CEMA Method
cema.subtitle: A complete analysis for an impeccable image.
cema.intro: CEMA is an exclusive consulting method that integrates four fundamental pillars of personal image, creating a 360° view of your visual potential.

pillars.name: Colorimetry
pillars.desc: Identification of the colors that best harmonize with your skin, eyes, and hair, creating a personal palette that enhances your natural beauty and conveys the right emotions.

pillars.name: Style
pillars.desc: Mapping of your visual essence and identification of your predominant style category, creating a cohesive and authentic identity for every sphere of your life.

pillars.name: Makeup
pillars.desc: Guidance on techniques, products, and palettes that highlight your unique characteristics, focused on expressing your personality and meeting your daily routine needs.

pillars.name: Accessories
pillars.desc: Curation of the right pieces to complement each composition — from jewelry to bags, from footwear to scarves — with harmony, proportion, and intention.

cema.cta: I want the complete CEMA method

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Each service is designed to deliver real and transformative results.

items.title: Closet Cleanse
items.desc: A practical and revealing session where we analyze each piece in your wardrobe. We identify what stays, what goes, and what is missing — building a functional, harmonious closet aligned with who you are today.

items.title: Color Palette
items.desc: Through colorimetry analysis, I identify the colors that best favor your skin, eyes, and hair. You receive your personalized palette with guidance on how to apply it in everyday life.
highlights: Application for fashion, makeup, and accessories

items.title: Color Day Session
items.desc: A complete immersion in the world of color. Throughout the day, we experience in practice how different tones impact your appearance and energy — a transformative and very special experience.
highlights: Full day dedicated to your image

items.title: Event Styling
items.desc: For moments when every detail matters. We take care of your complete look — from clothing to accessories — so you appear with confidence, sophistication, and full alignment with the event.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let us build together an image that represents the best of you.

faq.title: F.A.Q.
faq.subtitle: Find answers about image consulting, services, and appointments.

items.question: How does the first consultation work?
items.answer: We begin with a conversation to understand your goals, routine, and the image challenges you want to address.

items.question: Are online appointments available?
items.answer: Yes. In-person and online options are available depending on the selected service and your location.

items.question: How long does a consultation take?
items.answer: The duration depends on the service. The schedule and every stage are presented before we begin.

items.question: Do I need to buy new clothes?
items.answer: Not necessarily. The consultation prioritizes making the most of what you already own and recommends new pieces only when useful.

items.question: How do I choose the right service?
items.answer: Send a message through the contact form. Based on your goals, we will recommend the most suitable option.
